text.message: Blue has a city and two devs?
I actually can’t get over that
Green will move it for this trade
You’re gonna complain that much then not trade?
I really cannot conceive how that happened
Refuses to trade and complains more than anyone. 18% makes sense
Might be the worst move I’ve ever seen
You win 18% of the time my guy
Cut me off and the game is over bud
The worst play I’ve ever seen without a doubt
The man has six devs and I’m getting solod
i think it was for the plow...
Do you think decisions don’t have repercussions in this world?
